author: zhywjml
description: Organize sidebar icons into grouped hover menus. Create custom groups to declutter your sidebar. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: zhywjml
manifest.description: Organize sidebar icons into grouped hover menus. Create custom groups to declutter your sidebar.
manifest.name: Sidebar Organizer

name: Sidebar Organizer

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
【热修复】移动端触控防穿透：修复了在 v1.5.6 版本中遗漏的底层代码。插件现在已成功在捕获阶段（Capture Phase）实装了原生硬件触摸事件（touchstart、touchend、pointerdown、pointerup）的全面拦截。
体验改进：在手机或平板等触屏设备上点击分组图标时，将 100% 准确弹出悬浮菜单，彻底解决了误触直接执行分组内第一项功能（如关系图谱等）的底层手势冲突问题。
What's Changed

[Hotfix] Mobile touch bypass resolved: Fixed an issue where the underlying touch interceptor code was missing in v1.5.6. The plugin now correctly binds hardware touch event blockers (touchstart, touchend, pointerdown, pointerup) in the capture phase.
UX Improvement: Tapping a group icon on touchscreens (smartphones/tablets) will now reliably trigger the popup menu 100% of the time, completely eliminating the gesture conflict where the first item's native action (e.g., Graph View) was accidentally triggered.
releases.name: v1.5.7

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
更新内容

- 移动端触摸防穿透修复：新增硬件触摸事件（touchstart / touchend）拦截机制，修复了在触屏设备上点击分组图标时，会直接触发分组内第一个功能的底层逻辑、导致弹窗未能正常展示的问题。
- 自定义图标全平台尺寸自适应：剥离了由于自定义 SVG 导入及 CSS 造成的死板宽高像素（px）限制，现在无论是侧边栏的分组图标，还是弹出菜单内的功能图标，都会完全听命于 Obsidian 官方底层根据当前设备动态下发的原生尺寸变量（var(--icon-size)），从而在手机、平板与电脑上做到原生般完美的尺寸统一。

What's Changed

- Mobile touch event interception fix: Implemented a new touch event interceptor (touchstart / touchend) to prevent physical taps on touchscreens from triggering the underlying native action of the first icon instead of opening the popup menu.
- Custom icon dynamic scaling: Stripped hardcoded pixel constraints from custom SVGs and CSS rules. Both sidebar group icons and inner popup action icons now dynamically adapt to Obsidian's native --icon-size variable, guaranteeing consistent scaling across desktops, tablets, and smartphones.
releases.name: v1.5.6

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
更新内容

版本兼容性回退机制修复：撤回了对高版本专属 API（getSettingDefinitions）的依赖调用，全面恢复了稳定版底层渲染逻辑（display()）。
降低安装门槛：重新将插件最低支持的 Obsidian 版本 (minAppVersion) 门槛大幅降回至 0.15.0。完美解决了因版本门槛过高导致部分手机端及旧版桌面端用户无法搜索到、或无法更新插件的问题。
包含之前的所有移动端修复：保留了 1.5.x 系列中所有关于移动端弹窗防遮挡、事件防穿透、平板设备智能识别以及自定义 SVG 图标渲染的核心修复。
What's Changed

Restored maximum backward compatibility: Completely removed the experimental high-version API (getSettingDefinitions) usage, reverting to the stable and fully compatible display() rendering pipeline for the settings panel.
Lowered minimum version requirement: Reverted minAppVersion requirement back down to 0.15.0. This permanently fixes the issue where mobile users and users on older Obsidian versions were completely unable to discover, install, or update the plugin.
All previous mobile fixes retained: Successfully preserved all massive under-the-hood fixes from the 1.5.x series, including the precise DOM layout detection for tablets, mobile click-interception algorithms, and custom SVG icon rendering fixes.
releases.name: v1.5.5

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
更新内容

提升多窗口（Popout）兼容性：全面改用 activeDocument 替代全局 document 对象，解决在分离窗口情况下的操作失效问题。
版本声明更新：将 minAppVersion 更新至 1.13.0，解决了在新 API 调用时产生的版本不支持警告。
代码规范修复：根据 Obsidian 官方 Linter 检查结果，修复了事件调度相关的警告，移除了废弃的 Tooltip API 及未使用的变量和导入。
构建依赖优化：移除了打包脚本中对冗余第三方库（builtin-modules）的依赖，改用 Node.js 内置模块。
What's Changed

Popout window compatibility: Replaced global document with activeDocument to ensure compatibility when using Obsidian in popout/multiple windows.
Version declaration update: Bumped minAppVersion to 1.13.0 to resolve API warnings caused by outdated version configurations.
Linting & cleanup: Addressed Obsidian official linter warnings, removed deprecated tooltip APIs, and cleaned up unused variables and imports.
Build dependencies: Removed redundant third-party packages (builtin-modules) in favor of native Node.js modules.
releases.name: v1.5.3

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **修复 `display` 弃用警告** — 适配 Obsidian 1.13.0+ 的新声明式设置 API，改用 `getSettingDefinitions()` 替代已弃用的 `display()` 方法，消除控制台弃用提示，同时保留 `display()` 向后兼容旧版本
Description (English):
## What's Changed

- **Fix `display` deprecation warning** — Migrated to Obsidian 1.13.0+ declarative settings API using `getSettingDefinitions()` instead of the deprecated `display()` method. Eliminates console deprecation warning while keeping `display()` as a fallback for older versions.
releases.name: v1.5.2

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
# 全面支持桌面端布局以及移动端（平板布局）
# Full support for desktop and mobile (tablet layout) layouts.

## 更新内容

- **移动端适配** — 经测试已支持移动端（平板布局）以及桌面端布局。移动端侧边栏图标支持点击弹出、点击空白关闭，Genie 动画与桌面端一致
- **设置页移动端修复** — 移动端设置页创建分组时，现在能正确识别并显示所有插件的侧边栏按钮
- **修复 SVG 颜色覆盖** — 自定义图标设置 `fill="none"`（如空心五角星）时，不再错误填充为实心
- **README 更新** — 各语言版本补充移动端支持说明

## What's Changed

- **Mobile support** — Tested and confirmed working on both mobile (tablet layout) and desktop. Sidebar icons support tap-to-open and tap-outside-to-close on mobile. Genie animation consistent with desktop
- **Settings modal on mobile** — Create/edit group modal now correctly detects and displays all plugin sidebar actions on mobile devices
- **Fix SVG color override** — Custom icons with `fill="none"` (e.g. outlined star) are no longer incorrectly filled with `currentColor`
- **README updated** — Added mobile support notes in all language sections
releases.name: v1.5.0

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **修复 SVG 图标 fill 属性被覆盖** — 自定义图标设置 `fill="none"`（如空心五角星）时，颜色清理逻辑错误地覆盖为 `fill="currentColor"`，导致空心图标变实心。修复后正确识别 SVG 根元素的已有属性，空心图标保持空心。
releases.name: v1.4.6

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
## 更新内容

- **移除自动检测分组** — 取消了自动分组功能，所有分组管理改为完全手动通过自定义分组进行
- **设置页模态框修复** — 修复点击分组标题（全选/取消全选）时页面滚动跳转问题；修复左右面板同步，改用 `data-action-id` 替代脆弱的名称匹配
- **插件加载修复** — 修复 `ReferenceError: SidebarOrganizerPlugin is not defined` 错误，esbuild 格式切换为 `iife` + `globalName`
- **README 更新** — 优化顶部展示表格布局，移除过时的拖拽排序和自动分组介绍

## What's Changed

- **Removed auto-detected groups** — Auto-grouping feature removed. All group management is now fully manual via custom groups.
- **Settings modal UX fixes** — Fixed scroll jumping when clicking group headers (select/deselect all). Fixed left-right panel sync using `data-action-id` instead of fragile name matching.
- **Plugin load fix** — Fixed `ReferenceError: SidebarOrganizerPlugin is not defined` by switching esbuild format to `iife` with `globalName`.
- **Readme updated** — Cleaner showcase table layout, removed outdated drag-and-drop and auto-grouping mentions.
releases.name: v1.4.5

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
v1.4.1 — Bug Fixes
修复插件无法加载
CJS 导出修复：改用 format: 'iife' + globalName，确保 module.exports 正确输出插件类到 Obsidian 加载器，解决 ReferenceError: SidebarOrganizerPlugin is not defined。
修复设置页模态框滚动跳跃
分组标题点击（全选/取消全选）不再触发 renderStep1() 完整重建，改为原地切换项目状态 + 只更新右侧面板，完全保持滚动位置。
修复左右面板同步
- 右侧面板移除按钮改用 data-action-id 属性匹配，替代原来的 textContent 名称匹配（重名时失效）
- 移除时同步更新左侧面板组标题的 all-selected 状态

releases.author: zhywjml
releases.description:
## Sidebar Organizer v1.0.0

  ### Features
  - Custom groups for merging sidebar icons
  - Custom SVG icons support
  - Blur effect for popup menus
  - Drag & drop reordering
  - 8 languages support (en, zh, ja, ko, de, ru, es, fr)

  ### Installation
  Download `main.js`, `styles.css`, and `manifest.json` below.
releases.name: v1.0.0
